episode.title: MTGFastFinance Ep 505: Is Avatar The Best Singles Set Since MH3?
episode.description:
James and Cliff drop knowledge on all the lastest in #mtgfinance, including fast movers, cards to watch, meta changes and take a deeper look at the plethora of MTG x Avatar cards that are commanding high prices. 

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
